44.reason: [This only zeroes the next term but doesn't remove it or shift subsequent terms. Later, zero-coefficient terms are skipped in output, but this approach fails to combine more than two like terms correctly (e.g., three terms with same exponent). Also, after combining, the next term may still have same exponent as current, but loop moves forward without rechecking.]
